items.title: The financial winners and losers from the World Cup
items.summary: Big bucks are being made from the 2026 tournament off the field, but who is raking in the most, and who is losing out?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: England release Dawson and Banton for T20 Finals Day
items.summary: Hampshire's Liam Dawson and Somerset's Tom Banton will be released from England's one-day international squad to play in Saturday's T20 Finals Day.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Clark 'a political football' says NBA chief Silver
items.summary: NBA commissioner Adam Silver believes the debate around the treatment of Indiana Fever star Caitlin Clark is "not largely about officiating".
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
